patches.reason: Added useEffect-driven scroll progress hook that drives a --scf-scroll-fade CSS variable. New @media (max-width: 640px) rule applies opacity: var(--scf-scroll-fade) to .scf-svg so the orb fades from 1 → 0.15 as the visitor scrolls past 60% of the viewport on mobile. Desktop ignores the variable, keeping the orb persistent.
Strengthened the mobile role-badge scrim from bg-bg/60 px-2 py-1 to bg-bg/80 px-3 py-1.5 so FRONTEND DEVELOPER stays readable above the SvgCoreFallback orb at 414x896.

summary: Mobile-only fade-out for SvgCoreFallback orb (driven by scrollY vs window height) so Projects, Experience, and Contact sections own their fold instead of competing with the orb. Bumped hero role-badge scrim opacity + padding for 414px readability. typecheck clean; production build succeeded.
